<!--
Thanks for contributing!

Please note: Aneirin is closed source. We do NOT accept pull requests that change
the optimizer engine. Pull requests to the DOCUMENTATION (README, guides) are
welcome. For bugs or ideas, please open an issue instead.
-->

## What does this change?

<!-- A short description. Docs / typo / wording only. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation fix (typo, wording, broken link)
- [ ] Other (please explain below)

## Checklist

- [ ] This change is limited to documentation (not the engine).
- [ ] I did not include any private prompts, code, or secrets.
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md).

<!--
If you were about to submit an engine code change: please open a feature request
issue instead. We read every one.
-->
